description_long: This object is a modern potted plant featuring a geometric, angular concrete planter with a faceted design. The planter is filled with soil and contains three tall, slender stems that support clusters of thick, green, succulent-like leaves at their tops. The concrete pot has a raw, unfinished texture with visible surface grain and a light gray coloration, accented by darker triangular facets. The plant itself appears healthy, with vibrant green foliage and woody brown stems, and there is a small, rounded stone or decorative element visible among the soil. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, making it suitable for urban environments. The combination of the stark concrete and lush greenery creates a striking visual contrast.
description: A geometric concrete planter holds three tall, succulent-like plants with green foliage and woody stems, accented by a small stone in the soil. The design is modern and minimalist, with a faceted, raw-textured pot.
description_view_0: This view highlights the angular, faceted side of the concrete pot and shows two of the plant stems prominently, with the third partially obscured.
description_view_1: From this angle, the planter appears more symmetrical, and all three plant stems are visible, with the foliage forming a triangular arrangement.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the slanted edge of the pot and provides a clear view of the plant stems and the small stone inside.
description_view_3: The front-facing view displays the pointed, triangular face of the pot and the arrangement of all three plant stems and their green foliage.
